atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The physical examination reveals a slight 2/6 systolic ejection murmur.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Lung sounds are clear bilaterally.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Trace lower extremity edema is noted bilaterally.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: An EKG performed by the nurse shows no abnormalities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Vital signs are stable: blood pressure 132/78 mmHg, heart rate 72 bpm, and oxygen saturation 98% on room air.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's depression is currently well-managed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Her hypertension is controlled with lisinopril.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: No acute medical concerns are identified.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I will schedule a mammogram for Elizabeth.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I recommend continuing lisinopril 20 milligrams daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I advise Elizabeth to monitor her blood pressures and contact me if they rise.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: We will schedule a follow-up appointment in four weeks to assess her progress and address any ongoing concerns.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I will also provide instructions on setting an alarm to remind her to take her medication.
